data.body: Follow-ups implemented: LangflowRunner REST client (0224 closed), code-review op + multi-reviewer aggregation + code-quality reviewer (47fb closed), batch epic-vs-spec scan + spec-alignment reviewer (453c closed). Live-runtime validation harness landed (b2e5, left in_progress — needs an actual run with API keys). New surface: rebar.llm.review_code/scan_epics_for_spec + CLI rebar review-code/scan-spec + gated MCP review_code/scan_spec. All offline-tested via FakeRunner; review default stays the langgraph runner.
